description_long: This is a wide-brimmed, deep red hat with a tall, cylindrical crown and a soft, slightly undulating brim. The hat appears to be made of a felt or suede-like material, giving it a matte and slightly textured finish. The crown is unadorned and rises smoothly from the brim, with subtle shading that suggests a soft, flexible structure. The brim is broad and gently curves downward, providing ample shade and a dramatic silhouette. There are no visible decorative elements, bands, or logos on the exterior. The overall style is reminiscent of a classic Western or cowboy hat, but with a more exaggerated, fashion-forward brim.
description: A deep red, wide-brimmed hat with a tall, cylindrical crown and a soft, matte finish. The hat is unadorned and has a dramatic, undulating brim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, downward-curving brim and the tall, cylindrical crown with no decorations.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the broad, undulating brim and the smooth, unembellished crown.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetrical shape of the crown and the even width of the brim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the wide brim and the soft, flexible appearance of the material.
attribute_brim_style: wide and flat with gentle undulations
